mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_message where receiver_id = #{receiverId} and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update sys_message set is_read = 1, read_time = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_message set is_read = 1, read_time = now() where receiver_id = #{receiverId} and is_read = 0
mapper.insert: insert into sys_message(title, content, msg_type, sender_id, receiver_id, is_read, create_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, 0, now())
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_message where id in
#{id}
